summary: Great‑sounding soundboard recording, though fans wish the ending of “Morning Dew” was included.
review: Both reviewers praise the soundboard source as sounding great, giving it high marks for clarity and mix quality. The only criticism is a request to hear the missing conclusion of “Morning Dew,” indicating the track may be truncated. No specific comments on the musical performance were provided.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviews are high‑rated (4–5 stars) and highlight excellent soundboard quality; limited show details keep the rating modest.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Soundboard praised as great with no major audio flaws mentioned, aside from a missing ending of “Morning Dew.”

show_quality.setlist_flow: No performance details provided; only a note that the end of “Morning Dew” is absent.
